2606.00995.title: Subliminal Learning Is Steering Vector Distillation
2606.00995.paper_summary: Subliminal learning refers to a student language model acquiring a teacher's traits (e.g. a system-prompted preference for owls) when fine-tuned on the teacher's outputs, despite the outputs being semantically unrelated to those traits. It remains poorly understood how data without semantic meaning can transfer specific semantic traits. In this work, we show that subliminal learning is mediated by a single steering vector, i.e. a vector added to the model's activations. Across two open-source models, we find that the teacher's system prompt is well approximated by a steering vector, and that the student's behavior is driven by learning an aligned vector over fine-tuning. System prompts that are not well approximated by steering vectors are not subliminally learned. This is a special case of steering vector distillation, in which a student trained on the outputs of a steered teacher learns to imitate that steering. We demonstrate steering vector distillation on a range of semantic and random vectors. Adding a semantic vector to a model's activations can have both model-independent and model-specific (i.e. non-semantic) effects on its behavior, so generated data that is non-semantic can transmit a vector with semantic effects, enabling subliminal learning. This also explains why subliminal learning does not transfer between models. We find that adaptive optimizers are necessary for subliminal learning in language models: activation gradients on steered data carry a small but consistent component along the steering direction, and non-adaptive optimizers impede this by allowing outlier gradients to dominate.
2606.00995.paper_summary_zh: 潛意識學習是指學生語言模型在微調老師的輸出時，獲得老師的特徵（例如，系統提示對貓頭鷹的偏好），儘管這些輸出在語義上與這些特徵無關。尚不清楚沒有語義意義的數據如何能夠傳遞特定的語義特徵。在這項工作中，我們顯示潛意識學習是由單一的引導向量介導的，即一個添加到模型激活的向量。在兩個開源模型中，我們發現老師的系統提示可以很好地用引導向量來近似，而學生的行為則是通過在微調過程中學習一個對齊向量來驅動的。那些無法被引導向量很好近似的系統提示並不會被潛意識學習到。這是一種引導向量蒸餾的特殊情況，其中在引導老師的輸出上訓練的學生學會模仿該引導。我們在一系列語義和隨機向量上展示了引導向量蒸餾。將語義向量添加到模型的激活中可以對其行為產生模型無關和模型特定（即非語義）的效果，因此生成的非語義數據可以傳遞具有語義效果的向量，從而實現潛意識學習。這也解釋了為什麼潛意識學習不會在模型之間轉移。我們發現自適應優化器對於語言模型中的潛意識學習是必要的：在引導數據上的激活梯度沿著引導方向攜帶一個小但一致的成分，而非自適應優化器則通過允許異常梯度主導來妨礙這一點。
2606.00995.author: Camila Blank et.al.
2606.00995.authors: Camila Blank, Agam Bhatia, Senthooran Rajamanoharan, Arthur Conmy, Neel Nanda
